prompt: A lively hand-drawn fashion portrait in a changed illustration style, made to look like a signed fan-art sketch drawn with markers on a square white shikishi board with a thin gold border. Show a stylish young woman from about the waist up, leaning slightly forward with one elbow resting up near her face in a casual, friendly pose. Her face area is covered by a simple rectangular censor block in a muted beige tone. She has shoulder-length medium brown hair with warm highlights, soft volume, side-swept bangs, and flipped-out ends. Render the art with expressive black ink outlines, visible marker strokes, watercolor-like blending, sketchy hatching, and an energetic, vivid handmade feel. She wears a fitted dark gray ribbed long-sleeve knit top with subtle puffed shoulders, layered delicate gold necklaces, a dangling pearl earring, a beige crossbody bag strap running diagonally across her chest, and a light beige skirt or dress visible at the waist. Leave plenty of clean white background around the figure. Add 2 small sparkle doodles on the left side. Add handwritten Japanese thank-you messages and signature-style black ink writing around the portrait: at upper right write ありがとう！ with an underline and a small heart, beneath it place a large stylized autograph reading Yui with a smiling face mark and a heart, at lower left write いつも応援してくれてありがとう♡, and at lower right write the date 2024.5.20 with another heart. The overall image should feel warm, personal, lively, and like a celebratory signed illustration on a square autograph board.
